productDisplayName: Probase Men Outdoor Event Grey Tshirts
description: Composition Grey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, and rubber print with screen print on the chest Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash/hand wash separately in mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Medium iron Do not iron on the print Beat the heat and surf through cool waters in this energetic t-shirt from probase. Made of pure cotton fabric, this slim Fit tee will keep you dry and comfortable all day, while you flaunt your well toned muscles on the waters. Pair it with denims and stylish lifestyle shoes when on land, and water shoes when surfing. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.3”, Shoulders-18"
